What it is

An immensely valuable unoffical MCP server linking accurately major AI systems interacting directly evaluating specific Xiaohongshu (RED) content posting dynamically automated mult-media operations flawlessly.

Problems solved

  • Abstracts entirely the massive structural complexity navigating highly restrictive Chinese social-media login constraints allowing precisely local MCP environments parsing effectively structured platform metadata mitigating safely catastrophic anti-bot throttling significantly.

How to get started

Launch structurally utilizing pre-compiled binaries defining explicitly XHS_PROXY executing carefully the localized xiaohongshu-login binary routing safely authenticated tokens loading properly MCP Inspector UI elegantly.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Xiaohongshu-MCP serves brilliantly automating absolutely core marketing analytics tracking implicitly specific content matrices converting directly highly popular conversational logic validating directly complex cross-channel Chinese media interactions robustly.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Creating automated social-media scrapers previously required extremely deep reverse-engineering of dynamic X-Sec tokens. This project completely isolates that complexity packaging perfectly headless-chrome contexts handling beautifully token generation establishing securely incredibly durable authenticated connections managing implicitly automated content dissemination absolutely flawlessly.

3. Technical Architecture

A functionally brilliant Golang-driven system parsing completely headless browser DOM events abstracting natively internal XHS API schemas wrapping inherently structured Model Context Protocol responses exporting dynamically thirteen specialized interaction endpoints precisely.

4. Core Implementation

Resolves initial user-login state executing precisely headless Chromium saving explicitly session cookies resolving securely necessary security hashes mapping strictly JSON interactions extracting thoroughly feed metadata translating precisely interaction parameters resolving flawlessly complex image/video deployment mechanics flawlessly.

5. Code Organization

Orchestrated effectively dividing strictly the primary login-extraction processes (/cmd/login) isolating completely background daemon API instances managing successfully explicit Docker compose networks compiling smoothly multi-architecture native binaries accurately.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Test deeply the "Comment Search" (search_comments) parameter querying specific viral threads identifying specifically conversion signals analyzing accurately how the agent processes inherently nested sub-comment interactions efficiently.

7. Summary

A massively significant developmental achievement encapsulating brilliantly incredibly restrictive proprietary security layers enabling profoundly valuable localized social media orchestration simulating flawlessly natural human interactions productively.
